title: Cyclosorus suprastrigosus
taxonomy: Cyclosorus suprastrigosus is classified within the family Thelypteridaceae, a group of ferns commonly known as the maiden's hair or lady fern family. This classification is based on its morphological characteristics, such as its pinnate leaves and delicate fronds. The genus Cyclosorus, which includes C. suprastrigosus, is often considered a synonym of the genus Hemionitis. However, some sources still recognize the genus Cyclosorus as a distinct group within the Thelypteridaceae family. The family Thelypteridaceae is part of the larger order Polypodiales, which includes many other families of ferns.
